We started off discussing his career plans and gradually the conversation progressed to our favourite movies. He’s a fan of Tracy Chu who’s an exquisitely beautiful woman. Samantha ko is also an exquisitely beautiful woman. Like him, they both have an exquisite taste in fashion, food, shoes and exterior design. Both of them are glamorous women who always dress up in glamorous outfits. They rarely dress down. just the other day I saw Tracy dress up in a kimono 👘 for a party whereas Samantha was in Superman costume. By the way I don’t think you need to dress up to go to work. A t-shirt and shorts are fine. Dress down to go to work. He’s also a boxing fan. Floyd will be fighting next January in Las Vegas. If he tests positive for steroids again the fans will be terribly disappointed in him. The promotor will also be bitterly disappointed with him since last year two of his tests came back positive. As a result he was suspended for half a year. However if he loses because of ring rust rust due to having been suspended for half a year, the fans including me will be deeply disappointed by the result. My brother who’s also a boxing fan too will be bitterly disappointed at the fact that he loses due to ring rust because of having been suspended. Last year I was a bit disappointed to hear his fight with manny was overturned to a no contest because he failed the drug tests. The fans too were deeply disappointed to find he would be suspended. A rematch between him and Manny is being arranged. In their first fight, Floyd started off with a right cross followed by a left uppercut which knocked him out. The fans are excited about the rematch but Floyd has upped the ante by demanding a salary twice as much. Hopefully it’ll eventually happen.
